untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculating a ratio between two separate market indices (DJT/SPX) and comparing it to that ratio's moving average. The allowed indicator set does not support multi-instrument ratios or synthetic indicator construction. DJT and SPX are separate data series not available as pre-computed indicators in the allowed list.
translation_notes: The signal logic describes a regime filter using an inter-market relationship (Dow Transportation vs S&P 500 ratio). This requires external data preprocessing to compute the ratio time series and its SMA before rule evaluation. The backtest engine would need to be extended to support dual-instrument ratio calculations or the ratio must be pre-computed as a separate input series.
